name: Miradore Mobile Device Management API
what_it_does: Miradore REST API for cloud-based Mobile Device Management (MDM) platform. Enables AI agents to manage device enrollment and lifecycle, handle application deployment and management, access device inventory and compliance status, retrieve security policy enforcement data, manage remote wipe and lock capabilities, handle BYOD and corporate device profiles, access location tracking and geofencing data, retrieve device health and battery analytics, manage certificate and VPN configuration, and integrate device management with IT helpdesk and ITSM systems.
use_cases: Managing device enrollment and lifecycle from IT endpoint automation agents
Deploying applications and policies from device management automation agents
Monitoring device compliance and security status from IT security agents
Integrating MDM with ITSM from IT operations automation agents
not_for: Large enterprise MDM without SMB-scale device management focus
Complex UEM without mobile-first MDM simplicity
Non-mobile endpoint management without iOS/Android focus
best_when: A SMB or mid-size organization using Miradore wants AI agents to automate device enrollment, application deployment, compliance monitoring, security policy enforcement, and ITSM integration for mobile device management.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Device location tracking raises employee privacy concerns. BYOD device management must carefully separate personal and corporate data. Remote wipe automation must have strong authorization controls — accidental wipes destroy personal data. Device inventory data reveals sensitive organizational information.

auth.notes: Miradore uses API key authentication. Organization-level credentials. Developer portal with API documentation. Webhooks for device and enrollment events. No granular scope control. Simple API key model suitable for SMB automation.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free tier: unlimited devices with basic MDM; Business and Enterprise paid tiers
pricing.notes: Helsinki, Finland. Founded 2011. SMB-focused cloud MDM platform. Acquired by Better Mobile Security 2019. Free tier with unlimited devices is key differentiator. 18,000+ organizations. Strong SMB and mid-market MDM. GDPR-compliant Finnish company. Competes with ManageEngine Mobile Device Manager and Hexnode for SMB MDM.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Device location tracking — employee notice and consent required; BYOD personal data separation
Remote wipe automation must have explicit authorization — accidental wipe destroys personal data
No public MCP server — simple API key REST API with basic documentation
No granular scopes — API key grants full account access; restrict at network/IP level
GDPR mandatory for EU deployments — Finnish company with strong data protection practices
BYOD profile management — corporate wipe must only affect corporate container, not personal apps
agent_readiness.security_notes: Device management and location data. SOC2, GDPR, ISO27001. API key only. EU-first. BYOD personal data separation.

security_score_components.security_notes: MDM device data. SOC2, GDPR. API key only. EU data residency. No scope granularity. BYOD privacy.
